title: CCTVCraft
description: CCTVCraft 5 is a Minecraft mod that adds viewable cameras and other security devices to the game. While the mod focuses on enhancing in-game security, it also introduces tools and mechanics to bypass or counter those defenses.
body:
![Mod logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/northwesttrees-gaming/CCTVCraft-5/refs/heads/main/pages/svg/cctvcraft_logo.svg)
# About CCTVCraft
CCTVCraft 5 is a Minecraft mod that adds viewable cameras and other security devices to the game. While the mod focuses on enhancing in-game security, it also introduces tools and mechanics to bypass or counter those defences—creating a balanced and dynamic security system.

**See our official GitHub wiki for detail descriptions on how things in our mod work!**
  
![line break](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/northwesttrees-gaming/CCTVCraft-5/refs/heads/main/pages/svg/line_break.svg)
  
# Features
- Monitors blocks with in-game apps.
- Cameras blocks that can be viewed remotely using spectator mode.
- Jammers which can distrupt camera signals.
- Secure safes to store your resources in.
- Secure doors and hatches to prehibit parts of your base.
- Secure blocks can be pinlocked using the iron pinlock.
- Many things have their own crafting resources that create balance.
- Some blocks support can be dyed.
- Lockpicks can lockpick secure blocks which open a mini-game.
- And much more content is to come.
  
![line break](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/northwesttrees-gaming/CCTVCraft-5/refs/heads/main/pages/svg/line_break.svg)

# Languages
As of 5.3.0 the following languages are supported. Please use our GitHub issue tracker for translations for any translation errors or to add support for more languages.

- Arabic: (ar_sa)
- Dutch: (nl_nl)
- English: (en_us)
- French: (fr_fr)
- German: (de_de)
- Portuguese: (pt_pt)
- Spanish: (es_es)

![line break](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/northwesttrees-gaming/CCTVCraft-5/refs/heads/main/pages/svg/line_break.svg)

# Contributions
Huge thanks to the following people for their contributions to the mod!

- SyrupBoy: Contributed to the secure, safe textures in version 5.2.0.

![line break](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/northwesttrees-gaming/CCTVCraft-5/refs/heads/main/pages/svg/line_break.svg)

# Next Release

**Sound the Alarm Update**  
CCTVCraft: 5.4.0  
NeoForge: 1.21.8  

**Upcoming features for this update**  
- CD player block
- Music editor monitor app
- Document editor monitor app
- Music discs that can store custom made music on.
- Document discs that can store text data on.
- Empty discs that can create music and document discs.
- Utility panel, which will replace the camera app system.
- Alarm block that can play 3 custom alarm sounds.
- And more to come soon!

**Notes**  
- 3 New Alarm Sounds (Creative Commons 0 License)
  - Modification will be made to the sounds to work with loops better.
    - Industrial Alarm by Latranz
    - Siren Alarm by Kinoton
    - Sci-Fi Alarm by Soundwarf
